# Radio

Selects one option from a related set of choices.

## Install

```bash
pnpm dlx @stalk-ui/cli add @stalk-ui/radio
```

## Examples

<ComponentPreview
  slug="radio"
  example={0}
  code={`<Radio.Root name="plan"><Radio.Item label="Basic" value="basic" /></Radio.Root>`}
/>

```tsx
<Radio.Root name="plan">
  <Radio.Item label="Basic" value="basic" />
</Radio.Root>
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="radio"
  example={1}
  code={`<Radio.Root name="plan"><Radio.Item description="Best for small teams." id="plan-basic" label="Basic" value="basic" /></Radio.Root>`}
/>

```tsx
<Radio.Root name="plan">
  <Radio.Item description="Best for small teams." id="plan-basic" label="Basic" value="basic" />
</Radio.Root>
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="radio"
  example={2}
  code={`<Radio.Root name="plan"><Radio.Item invalid label="Required choice" value="required" /></Radio.Root>`}
/>

```tsx
<Radio.Root name="plan">
  <Radio.Item invalid label="Required choice" value="required" />
</Radio.Root>
```

## Props

| Prop          | Type        | Required | Default | Description |
| ------------- | ----------- | -------- | ------- | ----------- |
| `description` | `ReactNode` | No       | -       | -           |
| `invalid`     | `boolean`   | No       | -       | -           |
| `label`       | `ReactNode` | No       | -       | -           |
| `size`        | `RadioSize` | No       | -       | -           |

## Variants

| Variant   | Values           |
| --------- | ---------------- |
| `invalid` | `true`           |
| `size`    | `sm`, `md`, `lg` |

## Registry

- Manifest: `/r/radio.json`
- Recipe: `radio`
- Files: `src/components/ui/radio.tsx`
